title: Server-Side Compaction：自动压缩对话上下文

body.concept: Compaction（压实）是 Anthropic 提供的服务端功能，当对话接近 context window 上限时，自动将较早的对话内容总结为精简摘要。它解决的不仅是 token 数量限制——随着对话变长，模型在全部历史上保持注意力的能力会下降（即 context rot）。Compaction 用简洁的摘要替换过时内容，让活跃 context 保持聚焦、高效。
body.analogy: 像会议记录员：你不需要保留 3 小时会议的逐字稿，记录员帮你把讨论压缩成关键决策和行动项。Compaction 就是 Claude 的自动记录员——在对话变得太长之前，把旧内容压缩成要点摘要。
body.visual: 左侧：一长列对话消息，越靠上的越暗淡；右侧：顶部是一个小方块标注「摘要」，下方是最近的鲜亮消息。箭头从左到右，表示压缩过程。

body_en.concept: Compaction is a server-side feature from Anthropic that automatically summarizes older conversation content when approaching the context window limit. It doesn't just prevent hitting a token cap—as conversations grow longer, models struggle to maintain focus across the full history (context rot). Compaction replaces stale content with concise summaries, keeping the active context focused and performant.
body_en.analogy: Like a meeting note-taker: you don't need the full 3-hour transcript. The note-taker condenses discussions into key decisions and action items. Compaction is Claude's automatic note-taker—compressing old content into summary highlights before the conversation grows too long.
body_en.visual: Left side: a long column of conversation messages, older ones faded. Right side: a small block labeled 'Summary' at top, followed by bright recent messages. An arrow from left to right shows the compaction process.
